# Home Inspection Company Website - Project Setup

This is a professional website for a civil home inspection company built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Project Status
- [x] Project scaffolded with Next.js 16.2.6
- [x] TypeScript enabled
- [x] Tailwind CSS configured
- [x] ESLint configured
- [ ] Customize pages and components
- [ ] Deploy to production

## Technology Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 16.2.6 with App Router
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Package Manager**: npm

## Project Structure
```
src/
├── app/
│   ├── layout.tsx
│   ├── page.tsx
│   ├── about/
│   ├── services/
│   ├── gallery/
│   ├── pricing/
│   ├── blog/
│   └── contact/
├── components/
│   ├── Navbar.tsx
│   ├── Footer.tsx
│   ├── Hero.tsx
│   └── ...
└── styles/
    └── globals.css
```

## Getting Started
1. Install dependencies: `npm install`
2. Run dev server: `npm run dev`
3. Open http://localhost:3000

## Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run start` - Start production server
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint
